name: tilly-engineer-skills
description: Portable maturity-aware engineering discipline to reduce ambiguity, regressions, overcomplication, drive-by edits, and false completion in coding agents

interface.longDescription: Reusable TES skills for Think Before Coding, Maturity Layer Gate, Simplicity First, Surgical Changes, Goal-Driven Execution, initialization, semantic project alignment, Project GPS mapping, maestral goal prompt materialization, explicit-invocation project stress prospecting, code and domain knowledge mining, Obsidian opening preflight, update checks, MCP inspection, Field Reports, doctor checks, adapter materialization, and benchmark planning.
defaultPrompt: Use Tilly Engineer Skills to run /tes-init against this repository.
Use Tilly Engineer Skills to run /tes-align and produce an evidenced project operating mesh.
Use Tilly Engineer Skills to run /tes-map and refresh the current Project GPS position.
Use Tilly Engineer Skills to run /tes-open-obsidian after project context and alignment pass.
Use Tilly Engineer Skills to run /tes-update and report whether local TES helpers are current.
Use Tilly Engineer Skills to inspect adapter parity without claiming unsupported native surfaces.
